rulings.Rulings: continued to april 30, 2018 (Judge Stewart's next probate calendar). these matters were continued to spring so that the attorneys could file documents showing where the minor would be attending high school and proof that an appropriate apartement could be rented near that high school for the amount anticipated in the settlement agreement (as stated in the minutes, information re tuition and rent costs). Nothing re these issues has been filed, although the declaration filed 2/14/18 is noted re the relationship between the parties. deadline for filing in order to avoid an automatic continuance is wednesday, april 25, 2018.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MAY PHYLLIS LEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to may 14, 2018. an amendment to the petition was filed on 4/4/18 and notice of that amendment was given 3/27/18. Notice cannot be mailed before the pleading requiring notice is filed (SFLR 14.21.A.). In addition, the amendment is neither signed nor verified by the personal representative, a fiduciary appointed in this proceeding (which means the exception allowing an attorney to sign for the client does not apply). Once the verification is filed, the amendment must be re-mailed showing notice mailed no less than 15 days before the continued hearing date.
